News

Caroline Nokes MP visits award-winning Chalk Stream Foods in Awbridge

Friday, 9 January, 2026
It was a real pleasure to visit Chalk Stream yesterday afternoon and to hear more about their award-winning business. Based in Awbridge, ChalkStream has done an extraordinary job in putting Test Valley trout firmly on the map. They are a major supplier to the cruise industry and an important employer for Southampton and the wider region, combining local expertise with a growing national and...
